porcellino.note: Sit the seated boar level on its plinth (raw scan rests ~48deg off-axis); rotation from stable-pose analysis.

greek/kneeling-archer-figure-xii-aphaia-.note: Stand the crouching archer upright on its plinth (raw scan was inverted, plinth on top).

rodin/heroic-head-of-pierre-de-wissant.note: Flip 180deg so the mount stump is the base and the face points to the camera (raw scan was upside-down).

americas/bisj-ancestor-pole-jiem.note: Stand the bisj pole vertical to match its upright siblings (raw scan leaned ~6deg).

michelangelo/dawn.note: Start the viewer from a high oblique angle so the reclining figure is visible instead of the plain rear support.

michelangelo/madonna-of-the-stairs.note: Face the shallow relief toward the initial camera instead of the slab edge.

roman/portrait-of-julia-msr.note: Use the scan's Z-up axis; stable-pose auto-orientation placed the portrait head on its side.

roman/jupiter-with-thunderbolt-msr.note: Keep the source mesh's Y-up orientation; stable-pose auto-orientation laid the figurine down.

roman/satyr-mask-ra-36d-msr.note: Use the scan's Z-up axis; stable-pose auto-orientation presented the rear/side of the mask.

roman/portrait-of-an-unknown-woman-msr.note: Use the scan's Z-up axis; stable-pose auto-orientation placed the portrait head on its side.

asia/cosmic-buddha.note: Open on the carved front face of the relief; source GLB is already Y-up.

asia/brazier-of-rasulid-sultan-met.note: Box-shaped brazier on 4 legs; raw scan floats tilted ~40deg with no flat contact. Picked from trimesh's 7 candidate stable poses (this was NOT the solver's top-probability pick) by matching resulting bbox proportions to the Met's catalogued dimensions (H35.2 x W39.4 x D41.6cm, ratio 0.846) -- this candidate scored 0.848, essentially exact; the solver's top pick scored 0.655 (too flat) and visually still looked tilted on render. Confirmed legs-down via a low-poly offline render. Flagged for visual confirmation in the live viewer -- not yet checked against the project's real render pipeline (needs Chrome, unavailable in this session).

greek/athena-parthenos-fragment-smk-cast.note: Manual review: stand the helmet/head fragment upright and face the sculptural side; the stable-pose solve selected the casting support axis.

greek/seated-herakles-aphaia-smk-cast.note: Manual review: keep the stable-pose upright transform, but start from the opposite side so the archer's front and bow read in the gallery thumbnail.

greek/head-of-a-giant-smk-cast.note: Manual review: keep the source orientation so the Pergamon head faces the camera; the stable-pose solve laid the casting plug horizontally.

greek/athena-hope-head-smk-cast.note: Manual review: keep the source orientation so the Athena head opens to the camera; automated long-axis alignment emphasized the support instead of the face.

roman/laurel-wreathed-sacrificial-attend.note: Manual review: the shallow relief renders upright and front-facing in its source orientation.

americas/engraved-bamboo-container-kare-.note: Elongated (aspect 8.9); PCA long-axis aligned to vertical.

americas/stirrup-spout-bottle-feline-and.note: Manual review: use the stable-pose proposal; this VNTANA GLB is componentized but visually coherent.

asia/molded-plaque-couple-met.note: Manual review: use the best stable-pose proposal for the shallow molded plaque.

sub-saharan-africa/zoomorphic-headrest-n.note: Manual review: use the stable-pose proposal; this VNTANA GLB is componentized but visually coherent.
